title: Import my data
subtitle: Drop your distributor statement — the dashboard becomes yours, with your real numbers.
privacy: 100% local: your file never leaves your browser. No data is sent to any server.

dropzone.title: Drop your CSV statement here
dropzone.hint: or click to pick a file

errors.UNKNOWN_FORMAT: Unrecognized format — we need at least an earnings or quantity column.
errors.NO_DATA_ROWS: No usable rows found in this file.
errors.generic: Couldn't read this file. Make sure it's a CSV export from your distributor.

active.title: Your data is live
active.description: The whole dashboard now shows “{name}” — imported on {date} from {format}.
active.modules: Modules without imported data (rights, touring, splits…) show an empty state until their integrations arrive.
active.deleteConfirm: Your imported data will be erased from this browser. Continue?

success.title: Done — welcome home.
success.description: Your Pulse, your revenue, your valuation: everything is computed from your real numbers.

howto.title: Where to find your statement?
howto.believe: Believe Backstage → Financial reports → CSV export
